parameters.query: SELECT id, origin, destination, priority FROM routes WHERE active = true ORDER BY priority ASC;

parameters.=query:
INSERT INTO award_inventory (
  origin, destination, departure_date, cabin, airline, airline_code,
  flight_number, stops, duration_minutes, miles_required, taxes_usd,
  price_to_customer, price_market, seats_available, source_url, status, last_checked
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.origin }}', '{{ $json.destination }}', '{{ $json.departure_date }}', '{{ $json.cabin }}',
  '{{ $json.airline }}', '{{ $json.airline_code }}', '{{ $json.flight_number }}', {{ $json.stops }},
  {{ $json.duration_minutes }}, {{ $json.miles_required }}, {{ $json.taxes_usd }},
  {{ $json.price_to_customer }}, {{ $json.price_market }}, {{ $json.seats_available }},
  '{{ $json.source_url }}', 'available', NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (origin, destination, departure_date, cabin, flight_number)
DO UPDATE SET
  miles_required = EXCLUDED.miles_required,
  taxes_usd = EXCLUDED.taxes_usd,
  price_to_customer = EXCLUDED.price_to_customer,
  price_market = EXCLUDED.price_market,
  seats_available = EXCLUDED.seats_available,
  status = 'available',
  last_checked = NOW();

INSERT INTO scan_logs (
  route_id, origin, destination, scan_date, started_at, finished_at,
  results_found, status
) VALUES (
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.route_id }}',
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.origin }}',
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.destination }}',
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.date }}',
  NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute',
  NOW(),
  {{ $input.first().json.results_count || 0 }},
  'success'
);

INSERT INTO scan_logs (
  route_id, origin, destination, scan_date, started_at, finished_at,
  results_found, status, error_message
) VALUES (
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.route_id }}',
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.origin }}',
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.destination }}',
  '{{ $(\'Split in Batches\').item.json.date }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  0,
  'failed',
  'Error en el HTTP Request o tiempo de respuesta excedido.'
);

parameters.query:
DELETE FROM award_inventory 
WHERE last_checked < NOW() - INTERVAL '2 hours';
